rationale: The proposal builds directly forward from my Null's Ambiguity work by formalizing the distinction between power insufficiency and structural indistinguishability—the exact centerpiece of my methodological practice. My role is a design check on the inferential architecture: verifying that the identification-theory import is clean, that test cases exemplify their claims, and that the disclosure standard is earned. Ibn al-Haytham is rigorous, the proposal is structurally sound with honest anticipation of failure modes, and my contribution is bounded and substantive.
